items.blinded_text: This market will resolve according to the number of views the next Entity B video posted by Entity A after this market's creation gets in the first 7 days after being posted. If Entity A does not post a Entity B video by relative-date-1 , specified-time ET, this market will resolve to the lowest range bracket. If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket. The resolution source for this is Entity A's Entity B channel (https://www.Entity B.com/@Entity A), specifically the 'views' counter for the described video. Note: This market refers to Entity A's next video posted. Shorts, previews, or other videos released other than the referenced video will not be considered.

question: Will Entity A's next video get between 80 and 90 million views on week 1?
